title: Junior Revenue Manager at Pugmarks India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Pugmarks India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Pugmarks India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pugmarks India International Enterprises:
Pugmarks India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pugmarks India International Enterprises!
